audit_findings.finding: Unbounded read_text on CLI-supplied --article path — no size validation before loading entire file into memory. OOM / memory-pressure vector when user points at multi-GB file.
audit_findings.remediation: Stat file first; reject if st_size > 10 MB with structured JSON error before calling read_text.
